title: Quick-Win Feature Parity
overview: Close 30 feature gaps against agent-browser, gstack, and browser-use. All S-effort Playwright API calls. Batched by file to prevent merge conflicts.
scopeChallenge: Original EXPANSION plan (27 tasks) revised to REDUCTION (9 tasks) after founder review identified merge conflict risk with 15+ tasks modifying same files. Added ref staleness detection. Merged set geo + set media.

failureModes.mitigation: Catch Playwright error, rewrite to actionable message suggesting emulate

failureModes.risk: swipe touch events not supported in headless
failureModes.mitigation: Use page.evaluate to dispatch synthetic TouchEvents as fallback
Heuristic: @e, ., #, [ = selector. Contains / or ends .png/.jpg/.webp = path
Apply truncation to raw result only, before JSON wrapping
Assess caller impact — if too many callers, do count check at call site instead

failureModes.risk: Chain command sets out of sync
failureModes.mitigation: Explicitly update WRITE_SET/READ_SET in meta.ts:364-365 in same task

testCoverageMap.codepath: rightclick, mouse, wait extensions, tap, swipe, set geo/media, cookie clear/set
box bounding box, errors console filter
find alt/title/first/last/nth, screenshot element/clip, ref staleness, --max-output, doctor

tasks.title: Add all write commands (write.ts + server.ts WRITE_COMMANDS + chain WRITE_SET)
tasks.description: Add rightclick, tap, swipe, mouse, keyboard inserttext, scrollinto/scrollintoview, set geo/media, extend wait and cookie (clear, set with options, export/import file). Register in WRITE_COMMANDS and WRITE_SET in chain.
acceptanceCriteria: All new commands return expected output format
All extended commands preserve backward compatibility
All new commands registered in WRITE_COMMANDS and WRITE_SET
tap on non-touch context throws actionable error
cookie clear followed by cookies read returns empty
cookie export writes cookies to file, cookie import loads them back

tasks.title: Add all read commands (read.ts + server.ts READ_COMMANDS + chain READ_SET)
tasks.description: Add box and errors commands. Register in READ_COMMANDS and READ_SET in chain.
acceptanceCriteria: box returns valid JSON with numeric x, y, width, height
box with nonexistent element throws clear error

tasks.title: Extend meta commands (find, screenshot, doctor)
tasks.description: Extend find with alt/title/first/last/nth. Extend screenshot with element/ref and --clip. Add doctor and upgrade commands.
acceptanceCriteria: find alt/title finds elements by attribute
doctor reports Bun version and Chromium path
upgrade attempts to update the package

tasks.title: Add ref staleness detection
tasks.description: Add count check in resolveRef() in browser-manager.ts. Fails fast with actionable error if ref element no longer exists.
acceptanceCriteria: Stale ref throws immediately (~5ms) with message containing 'stale' and 'snapshot'
Valid ref works normally with no performance regression
Error message tells agent to re-run snapshot

tasks.title: CLI flags, registration, and help text
tasks.description: Add --max-output flag, register all new commands (including doctor, upgrade) in server.ts sets, update SAFE_TO_RETRY, update CLI help text.
acceptanceCriteria: All new commands in help text
box, errors, doctor, upgrade in SAFE_TO_RETRY
All new commands registered in correct command set

tasks.title: Test fixtures
tasks.description: Extend test/fixtures/interactions.html with elements for rightclick, find alt/title, mouse tracking, error trigger tests.

tasks.title: Tests for write commands
tasks.description: Add tests in test/interactions.test.ts for rightclick, mouse, wait extensions, tap, set geo, set media, cookie clear/set.
acceptanceCriteria: All new write command tests pass
At least one failure/edge case test

tasks.title: Tests for read commands
tasks.description: Add tests in test/commands.test.ts for box and errors commands.
acceptanceCriteria: box returns valid JSON with numeric values

tasks.title: Tests for meta commands and features
tasks.description: Add tests in test/features.test.ts for find extensions, screenshot element/clip, ref staleness, --max-output, doctor.
acceptanceCriteria: ref staleness fails fast with actionable error
